decisionLog.rationale: Marketing had the highest density of repetitive, AI-automatable tasks combined with a CMO willing to sponsor the experiment. Engineering and Sales had neither. The plan was always company-wide: marketing was the proving ground to build and validate the system before scaling it across the org.
Emails, office hours, and documentation produced near-zero adoption. Sitting with each person and building their specific workflow together produced 93%.

decisionLog.decision: Build vs. buy for vendor displacement
decisionLog.rationale: When the existing vendor’s core value could be replicated with AI + existing data platform capabilities, building in-house saved five- to six-figure annual licenses while giving us full control.
Vertex AI ADK provided enterprise-grade deployment, Google Cloud integration, and Gemini Enterprise gave every employee agent access without per-seat licensing friction.

decisionLog.decision: Strategy, implementation, education, in that order
decisionLog.rationale: Every failed AI rollout I studied led with the tool. A system shipped without strategy, or without the people to adopt it, becomes shelfware. The order is the core strategic insight: decide what to build, build it, then bring the team, never reversed.

failures.lesson: People need role-specific tools, not a general-purpose AI chat. A “one tool for everything” approach created decision paralysis.
Focused 1:1 coaching produced results. Async materials alone produced almost nothing. People don’t adopt AI from a PDF.
Access does not equal adoption. Giving everyone a tool without showing them their specific use case is giving them a hammer without showing them nails.
Multi-system integration (CRM + enrichment + sequencing + AI) requires more orchestration maturity than a team has in month three. Timing matters.

record.label: first-year economic value, itemized in the ledger

timelinePhases.name: Foundation
timelinePhases.desc: Assessment, first agent builds, early enablement sessions

timelinePhases.name: Enablement
timelinePhases.desc: One-on-one coaching, workflow design, team-specific tools

timelinePhases.name: Infrastructure
timelinePhases.desc: Knowledge Graph, MCP servers, platform integrations

timelinePhases.name: Scaling
timelinePhases.desc: Vendor displacements, automation at scale, measurement

timelinePhases.name: Transfer
timelinePhases.desc: First team operates independently. The playbook is ready, and the company-wide rollout begins.

timelinePhases.name: Company-wide
timelinePhases.desc: Same system across the whole company, on track to about 2x the first-phase efficiency rate.

transformationResults.detail: Software displaced, built in-house, or avoided. See the ledger

productionSystems.name: Paid Search Agent
productionSystems.description: Paid media analyst and optimization specialist. Google Ads analysis, keyword generation, ad copy, competitor analysis. 24 tools across 6 regional datasets.

productionSystems.name: CMO Marketing Intelligence
productionSystems.description: Executive marketing brain for the CMO. Strategic reasoning engine with attribution, funnel analysis, and ROI modeling. 20 tools, 110-question regression suite gating every deploy.

productionSystems.name: Competitive Intel Agent
productionSystems.description: AI competitive intelligence analyst. Battle cards, M&A tracking, sales enablement. 23 tools, 18 competitors tracked daily with live internet research.

productionSystems.name: Sales Discovery Agent
productionSystems.description: Sales discovery coach using a structured questioning framework. Generates 10–20 open-ended discovery questions with real-time adaptation from prospect responses. 11 graph-database tools.

productionSystems.name: MarketingHub
productionSystems.description: Multi-agent router that delegates to specialized agents (Competitive Intel, Knowledge Graph Assistant). Orchestration layer enabling agents to work as a coordinated system.
productionSystems.roi: One interface for all marketing AI

productionSystems.name: Creative Asset System
productionSystems.description: Gemini Enterprise agent generating brand-compliant creative across 6 output types: images, emails, presentations, SVG/vector, video, and social assets.

productionSystems.name: Agent Factory
productionSystems.description: AI agent inside the internal platform that builds other AI agents. Meta-tool: describe what you need, and it designs, builds, tests, and deploys the agent. 91% test pass rate.

productionSystems.name: One Chat Agent
productionSystems.description: Unified front-line agent connecting knowledge base, community, website, CRM, and support. One interface for all customer-facing interactions: the single pane of glass for customer engagement.

productionSystems.name: Stock Distribution Agent
productionSystems.description: Built for the HR and finance teams under their access controls: monitors employee stock distributions, departures, tax-document deadlines, and compliance events. Automated tracking of equity-related workflows.

productionSystems.name: AI Onboarding Experience
productionSystems.description: Onboards new customers with AI-guided training checklists, product tours, and personalized enablement paths. Adapts to each customer's use case and maturity level.

productionSystems.name: Rooster IQ
productionSystems.description: Brand intelligence watcher for the executive team. Monitors market trends, brand sentiment, competitor moves, voice of customer, and AI industry developments in real time.

productionSystems.name: Live Translator Agent
productionSystems.description: Real-time call translation agent enabling cross-language conversations during live meetings and customer calls. Bidirectional audio translation with minimal latency.

productionSystems.name: DAM Platform (Vendor Replacement)
productionSystems.description: Digital Asset Management platform built on the company’s internal platform, replacing an enterprise DAM vendor. 35K+ documents migrated with zero mismatches. 87 serverless functions, full ACL permission layer.

productionSystems.name: Employee Recognition Platform
productionSystems.description: Employee recognition and rewards platform built on the company’s internal platform. Nomination approvals, spot-bonus routing, anniversary tiers, budget management. 125 live budgets, 34/34 tests passing.

productionSystems.name: Signal Platform (AI SDR)
productionSystems.description: AI-powered SDR platform replacing a six-figure sales engagement tool. Chat widget, form interceptor, calendar booking, AI avatar modal. Full prospect qualification and meeting scheduling.

productionSystems.name: Media Relations Platform
productionSystems.description: Proactive AI media relations replacing a PR platform. Scans 17 RSS feeds daily, scores stories for company angle credibility, auto-generates pitches in 3 formats (interview, byline, Q&A).

productionSystems.name: Knowledge Graph + Figma Plugin
productionSystems.description: Graph database storing product messaging, competitive intelligence, and industry data. 55-tool API powering all agents. Custom Figma plugin connecting designers directly to on-brand messaging.

productionSystems.name: MCP Servers (3)
productionSystems.description: Three Model Context Protocol servers: Creative (image/video generation with brand enforcement), Knowledge Graph (23 tools), and Data Platform (146 tools, 647 endpoints).

productionSystems.name: Video Pipeline
productionSystems.description: Scalable AI-avatar video production system. Script generation via Knowledge Graph, AI avatar rendering, multi-format output (16:9, 9:16, vertical). Avatar registry for consistent branding.

productionSystems.name: Sales Navigator
productionSystems.description: Real-time AI sales coaching desktop app. Captures two-channel audio (rep + prospect), streams to speech recognition, delivers real-time coaching via AI overlay invisible on screen-share.
productionSystems.roi: AE ramp cut, close rates improved

productionSystems.name: AI Outbound Engine
productionSystems.description: Full automated outbound pipeline. Multi-stage: discover, enrich, sequence, agent feedback, converted prospect. Orchestrates data platform + Apollo for end-to-end prospecting.

productionSystems.name: Deck Builder
productionSystems.description: Automated PowerPoint generation from templates + data. Turns structured data into polished presentation decks without manual slide creation.

productionSystems.name: Weekly Executive Report
productionSystems.description: Automated CMO Friday report. Collects from SharePoint (Excel, Word) + the data platform’s dashboards (cards + screenshots), generates Word + PowerPoint output via AI.

productionSystems.name: Platform Monitoring Agents
productionSystems.description: Autonomous system health monitoring. Checks service health, data quality, git repos, toolkit sync, and cookie expiration. Hourly via launchd, alerts via email.

productionSystems.name: Tracking Workflow (News Monitor)
productionSystems.description: Two-workflow media monitoring system. Topic-continuity digest, airtight dedup, deterministic ticker-spam filter, SSRF host-resolution. 90-agent security audit remediated.

productionSystems.name: Front-End Sites (14)
productionSystems.description: Internal tools: operations consoles, agent showcases, monitoring dashboards, an executive reporting app, a messaging knowledge base, and more, fourteen in total. All React + Vite or Next.js.

Automated SEO optimization from 8 hours to 1 hour per batch using Webflow MCP
Using an agent trained on CRO best practices and page data for conversion optimization
Automated the entire webinar process with daily follow-up from agents
Built a scheduler to help attendees get scheduled for breakouts using AI
Utilizing AI in asset creation, event strategy, and overall research
Created specific agents for each communication type with custom guidelines
Using AI and the Knowledge Graph to create and audit content
Using AI to generate email copy, briefs, and campaign assets
Created and using multiple agents, optimizing the product launch content process
Implemented Webflow MCP to automate website audits
Using code connect, Figma MCP, and Webflow MCP to ensure pages are built correctly
Using Claude Code to create animations and optimize the messaging knowledge base
All major event creative assets were influenced and created with AI
Utilizing AI in community responses and working with the AI team on customer insights
Using Notebook LM for content distribution workflows
Implemented an AI content platform, automating the blog creation process end-to-end
Orchestrated the design and implementation of the department-wide AI adoption strategy
Utilizing Gemini Enterprise and Claude for calendar organization and communications
Utilizing AI to create complete slide decks end-to-end
